Markor is open and showing the file browser main interface. I can see the "Markor" title at the top, folder listings (.app, Work Notes), the file path (/storage/emulated/0/Documents), bottom navigation tabs (文件, To-Do, QuickNote, 更多), and the floating "+" button. No pop-ups or intro pages appeared.
